answer: The official population of Greater London in 2024 was 9,074,625. This figure is based on the latest demographic projections. The population has continued to grow since then.

results.title: London, UK Metro Area Population (1950-2026) - Macrotrends
results.snippet: ## London, UK Metro Area Population (1950-2026). ##### The current metro area population of London in 2026 is **9,927,000**, a **0.87% increase** from 2025. * The metro area population of London in 2025 was **9,841,000**, a **0.95% increase** from 2024. * The metro area population of London in 2024 was **9,748,000**, a **1.04% increase** from 2023. * The metro area population of London in 2023 was **9,648,000**, a **1.12% increase** from 2022. The full historical dataset is available for download here: London, UK Metro Population | Historical Data | 1950-2026. ## Total Population.

results.title: GLA 2024-based population projections – research outputs
results.snippet: The GLA's 2024-based demographic projections will be a key part of the evidence base for the next London Plan.
